sources.name: index.ts
sources.content:
export * from "./sidebar.style"
export * as Sidebar from "./namespace"
export {
  SidebarContent,
  SidebarFooter,
  SidebarGroup,
  SidebarGroupContent,
  SidebarGroupLabel,
  SidebarHandle,
  SidebarHeader,
  SidebarItem,
  SidebarItemContent,
  SidebarItemEndElement,
  SidebarItemIndicator,
  SidebarItemLabel,
  SidebarItemLink,
  SidebarItemStartElement,
  SidebarItemTrigger,
  SidebarMainPanel,
  SidebarMenu,
  SidebarMenuButton,
  SidebarPropsContext,
  SidebarRoot,
  SidebarSidePanel,
  SidebarTrigger,
  useSidebarPropsContext,
} from "./sidebar"
export type {
  SidebarContentProps,
  SidebarFooterProps,
  SidebarGroupContentProps,
  SidebarGroupLabelProps,
  SidebarGroupProps,
  SidebarHandleProps,
  SidebarHeaderProps,
  SidebarItemContentProps,
  SidebarItemEndElementProps,
  SidebarItemIndicatorProps,
  SidebarItemLabelProps,
  SidebarItemLinkProps,
  SidebarItemProps,
  SidebarItemStartElementProps,
  SidebarItemTriggerProps,
  SidebarMainPanelProps,
  SidebarMenuButtonProps,
  SidebarMenuProps,
  SidebarRootProps,
  SidebarSidePanelProps,
  SidebarTriggerProps,
} from "./sidebar"
export * from "./use-sidebar"

sources.name: namespace.ts
sources.content:
export type {
  SidebarContentProps as ContentProps,
  SidebarFooterProps as FooterProps,
  SidebarGroupContentProps as GroupContentProps,
  SidebarGroupLabelProps as GroupLabelProps,
  SidebarGroupProps as GroupProps,
  SidebarHandleProps as HandleProps,
  SidebarHeaderProps as HeaderProps,
  SidebarItemContentProps as ItemContentProps,
  SidebarItemEndElementProps as ItemEndElementProps,
  SidebarItemIndicatorProps as ItemIndicatorProps,
  SidebarItemLabelProps as ItemLabelProps,
  SidebarItemLinkProps as ItemLinkProps,
  SidebarItemProps as ItemProps,
  SidebarItemStartElementProps as ItemStartElementProps,
  SidebarItemTriggerProps as ItemTriggerProps,
  SidebarItem as ItemType,
  SidebarMainPanelProps as MainPanelProps,
  SidebarMenuButtonProps as MenuButtonProps,
  SidebarMenuProps as MenuProps,
  SidebarRootProps as RootProps,
  SidebarSidePanelProps as SidePanelProps,
  SidebarTriggerProps as TriggerProps,
} from "./sidebar"
export {
  SidebarContent as Content,
  SidebarFooter as Footer,
  SidebarGroup as Group,
  SidebarGroupContent as GroupContent,
  SidebarGroupLabel as GroupLabel,
  SidebarHandle as Handle,
  SidebarHeader as Header,
  SidebarItem as Item,
  SidebarItemContent as ItemContent,
  SidebarItemEndElement as ItemEndElement,
  SidebarItemIndicator as ItemIndicator,
  SidebarItemLabel as ItemLabel,
  SidebarItemLink as ItemLink,
  SidebarItemStartElement as ItemStartElement,
  SidebarItemTrigger as ItemTrigger,
  SidebarMainPanel as MainPanel,
  SidebarMenu as Menu,
  SidebarMenuButton as MenuButton,
  SidebarPropsContext as PropsContext,
  SidebarRoot as Root,
  SidebarSidePanel as SidePanel,
  SidebarTrigger as Trigger,
  useSidebarPropsContext as usePropsContext,
} from "./sidebar"
export type { SidebarControl as Control } from "./use-sidebar"
export {
  SidebarContext as Context,
  SidebarDescendantsContext as DescendantsContext,
  SidebarItemContext as ItemContext,
  useSidebarContext as useContext,
  useSidebarDescendant as useDescendant,
  useSidebarDescendants as useDescendants,
  useSidebarItemContext as useItemContext,
} from "./use-sidebar"
